channel.title: Prank on programmerraja blog
channel.description: Recent content in Prank on programmerraja blog

item.title: C-razy Facebook Hack: How I Pranked My Friend
item.description: It was my first year of college, and we were all working in the Python lab. My friends, who didn’t really know much about computers, seemed like the perfect targets for a harmless prank. They were excited but didn’t have a clue about the technical stuff I was up to. I saw an opportunity to have a little fun, knowing they’d fall for it because they didn’t know much about programming.
